case_title: KATHRYN SHIELDS VS. CON-QUEST CONTRACTOR, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,731.59 FILED BY SHIELDS, KATHRYN AS TO DEFENDANT CON-QUEST CONTRACTOR, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-08-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-05-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-17-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL LOUKIANOFF, PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CON-QUEST CONTRACTOR, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING. PLAINTIFF KATHRYN SHIELDS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CALEB KAUFFMAN. DEFENDANT CON-QUEST CONTRACTOR, INC., REPRESENTED BY PAUL LOUKIANOFF, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCES TO THE COURT VIA EMAIL BY TODAY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIELDS, KATHRYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CON-QUEST CONTRACTOR, INC. $3,731.59 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,781.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
